controls.control_objective: To ensure mean state co- operative banks and central co-operative banks, as defined in the national bank for agriculture and rural development act, 1981
controls.control_description:
Chapter I: Preliminary
Explanation: In this context, rural co-operative banks shall mean State Co-
operative Banks and Central Co-operative Banks, as defined in the National
Bank for Agriculture and Rural Development Act, 1981.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to mean state co- operative banks and central co-operative banks, as defined in the national bank for agriculture and rural development act, 1981

controls.control_objective: To ensure be called the reserve bank of india (rural co-operative banks - classification, valuation, and operation of investment portfolio) directions, 2025
controls.control_description:
These Directions shall be called the Reserve Bank of India (Rural Co-operative
Banks - Classification, Valuation, and Operation of Investment Portfolio)
Directions, 2025.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be called the reserve bank of india (rural co-operative banks - classification, valuation, and operation of investment portfolio) directions, 2025

controls.control_objective: To ensure come into effect from the date of issue
controls.control_description: These Directions shall come into effect from the date of issue.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to come into effect from the date of issue

controls.control_objective: To ensure be applicable to rural co-operative banks (hereinafter collectively referred to as 'rcbs' and individually as 'rcb') operating in india
controls.control_description:
These Directions shall be applicable to Rural Co-operative Banks (hereinafter
collectively referred to as 'RCBs' and individually as 'RCB') operating in India.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be applicable to rural co-operative banks (hereinafter collectively referred to as 'rcbs' and individually as 'rcb') operating in india

controls.control_objective: To ensure bear the meanings assigned to them below: (1) 'current or valid credit rating' for the purpose of determining rated security means a credit rating gra
controls.control_description:
For the purpose of these Directions, unless the context states otherwise, the
terms herein shall bear the meanings assigned to them below:
(1) 'Current or Valid Credit Rating' for the purpose of determining rated
security means a credit rating granted by a credit rating agency in India,
registered with the Securities and Exchange Board of India (SEBI) and
fulfilling the following conditions:
i The credit rating letter and rating rationale from the credit rating agency
shall preferably be part of offer document.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to bear the meanings assigned to them below: (1) 'current or valid credit rating' for the purpose of determining rated security means a credit rating gra

controls.control_objective: To ensure be more than one month old and rating rationale shall not be more than one year old from the date of opening of issue
controls.control_description:
ii The credit rating letter shall not be more than one month old and rating
rationale shall not be more than one year old from the date of opening
of issue.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be more than one month old and rating rationale shall not be more than one year old from the date of opening of issue

controls.control_objective: To ensure be in force and confirmed from the website of the respective credit rating agency
controls.control_description:
<image>
iii In the case of secondary market acquisition, the credit rating of the
issue shall be in force and confirmed from the website of the respective
credit rating agency.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be in force and confirmed from the website of the respective credit rating agency

controls.control_objective: To ensure a security which carries current or valid credit rating
controls.control_description:
(3) 'Rated Security' means a security which carries current or valid credit
rating.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to a security which carries current or valid credit rating

controls.control_objective: To ensure securities which do not have a current or valid credit rating
controls.control_description:
(4) 'Unrated Securities' means securities which do not have a current or
valid credit rating.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to securities which do not have a current or valid credit rating

controls.control_objective: To ensure have the same meaning as have been assigned to them under the banking regulation act (as applicable to co-operative societies), the reserve bank of in
controls.control_description:
All other expressions unless defined herein shall have the same meaning as
have been assigned to them under the Banking Regulation Act (As applicable
to Co-operative Societies), the Reserve Bank of India Act (RBI Act), rules /
regulations made thereunder, or any statutory modification or re-enactment
thereto or as used in commercial parlance, as the case may be.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to have the same meaning as have been assigned to them under the banking regulation act (as applicable to co-operative societies), the reserve bank of in

controls.control_objective: To ensure approve the investment policy of an rcb as specified in paragraph 14(1)
controls.control_description:
The Board of Directors (Board) shall approve the Investment Policy of an RCB
as specified in paragraph 14(1).
controls.implementation_method: Establish and maintain policy to approve the investment policy of an rcb as specified in paragraph 14(1)

controls.control_objective: To ensure approve the shifting of investments to / from the permanent category as specified in paragraph 28
controls.control_description:
The Board shall approve the shifting of investments to / from the Permanent
Category as specified in paragraph 28.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to approve the shifting of investments to / from the permanent category as specified in paragraph 28

controls.control_objective: To ensure be responsible to ensure that appropriate risk management systems are in place for capturing and analysing the risk in respect of non-slr investments
controls.control_description:
The Board shall be responsible to ensure that appropriate risk management
systems are in place for capturing and analysing the risk in respect of non-SLR
investments and for taking remedial measures in time as specified in paragraph
81.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be responsible to ensure that appropriate risk management systems are in place for capturing and analysing the risk in respect of non-slr investments

controls.control_objective: To ensure review the following aspects of non-slr investment at least on a half yearly interval as specified in paragraph 82
controls.control_description:
The Board shall review the following aspects of non-SLR investment at least on
a half yearly interval as specified in paragraph 82.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to review the following aspects of non-slr investment at least on a half yearly interval as specified in paragraph 82

controls.control_objective: To ensure approve and conduct an annual review of the panel of brokers with whom an rcb may undertake transactions as specified in paragraph 101
controls.control_description:
The Board shall approve and conduct an annual review of the panel of brokers
with whom an RCB may undertake transactions as specified in paragraph 101.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to approve and conduct an annual review of the panel of brokers with whom an rcb may undertake transactions as specified in paragraph 101

controls.control_objective: To ensure be informed post facto of any breach of the upper aggregate contract limit for individual brokers as specified in paragraph 103(4)
controls.control_description:
The Board shall be informed post facto of any breach of the upper aggregate
contract limit for individual brokers as specified in paragraph 103(4).
controls.implementation_method: Implement technical controls to configure system to be informed post facto of any breach of the upper aggregate contract limit for individual brokers as specified in paragraph 103(4)

controls.control_objective: To ensure review the investment portfolio of an rcb on a half-yearly basis as on march 31st and september 30th, and ensure that the same is placed before it wit
controls.control_description:
The Board shall review the investment portfolio of an RCB on a half-yearly
basis as on March 31st and September 30th, and ensure that the same is placed
before it within two months, i.e., by end-May and end-November respectively,
as specified in paragraph 109.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to review the investment portfolio of an rcb on a half-yearly basis as on march 31st and september 30th, and ensure that the same is placed before it wit

controls.control_objective: To ensure approve any decision of an rcb to build up a higher percentage of ifr up to 10 per cent depending on the size and composition of its portfolio, as spe
controls.control_description:
The Board shall approve any decision of an RCB to build up a higher
percentage of IFR up to 10 per cent depending on the size and composition of
its portfolio, as specified in paragraph 115(2).
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to approve any decision of an rcb to build up a higher percentage of ifr up to 10 per cent depending on the size and composition of its portfolio, as spe

controls.control_objective: To ensure undertake investment activities as per the terms and conditions specified in these directions
controls.control_description:
An RCB shall undertake investment activities as per the terms and conditions
specified in these Directions.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to undertake investment activities as per the terms and conditions specified in these directions

controls.control_objective: To ensure adopt a comprehensive investment policy duly approved by the board
controls.control_description:
(1) An RCB shall adopt a comprehensive Investment Policy duly approved by
the Board.
controls.implementation_method: Establish and maintain policy to adopt a comprehensive investment policy duly approved by the board

controls.control_description:
(2) The Investment Policy shall, at the minimum, include:
i The investment criteria and objectives to be achieved while
undertaking investment transactions, keeping in view the various
regulatory / statutory guidelines and the RCB's own internal
requirements.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to , at the minimum, include: i the investment criteria and objectives to be achieved while undertaking investment transactions, keeping in view the vari

controls.control_objective: To ensure include entry-level minimum credit ratings / quality standards and industry-wise, maturity-wise, duration-wise, and issuer-wise limits to mitigate the
controls.control_description:
vii Proper risk management systems for making investment in non-SLR
securities which shall include entry-level minimum credit ratings /
quality standards and industry-wise, maturity-wise, duration-wise,
and issuer-wise limits to mitigate the adverse impact of concentration
and liquidity risk.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to include entry-level minimum credit ratings / quality standards and industry-wise, maturity-wise, duration-wise, and issuer-wise limits to mitigate the

controls.control_objective: To ensure undertake any transactions on behalf of portfolio management scheme (pms) clients
controls.control_description:
An RCB shall not undertake any transactions on behalf of Portfolio
Management Scheme (PMS) clients.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to undertake any transactions on behalf of portfolio management scheme (pms) clients

controls.control_objective: To ensure be subjected to same degree of credit analysis as any loan proposal, irrespective of the fact that the proposed investments may be in rated securities
controls.control_description:
Investment proposals shall be subjected to same degree of credit analysis as
any loan proposal, irrespective of the fact that the proposed investments may
be in rated securities.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be subjected to same degree of credit analysis as any loan proposal, irrespective of the fact that the proposed investments may be in rated securities

controls.control_objective: To ensure entirely rely on the ratings of external credit rating agencies
controls.control_description:
An RCB shall make its own internal credit analysis and
credit rating even in respect of rated issues and shall not entirely rely on the
ratings of external credit rating agencies.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to entirely rely on the ratings of external credit rating agencies

controls.control_objective: To ensure ensure robust internal credit rating systems, including a mechanism for regular (quarterly or half-yearly) tracking of the financial position of the i
controls.control_description:
An RCB shall ensure robust internal credit rating systems, including a
mechanism for regular (quarterly or half-yearly) tracking of the financial position
of the issuer to ensure continuous monitoring of the rating migration of the
issuers / issues.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to ensure robust internal credit rating systems, including a mechanism for regular (quarterly or half-yearly) tracking of the financial position of the i

controls.control_objective: To ensure settle the transactions in securities as per procedure prescribed in notifications / directions / guidelines issued by the concerned regulator
controls.control_description:
An RCB shall settle the transactions in securities as per procedure prescribed
in notifications / directions / guidelines issued by the concerned regulator.
controls.implementation_method: Establish and maintain policy to settle the transactions in securities as per procedure prescribed in notifications / directions / guidelines issued by the concerned regulator

controls.control_objective: To ensure hold its investments in securities only in dematerialised form
controls.control_description: An RCB shall hold its investments in securities only in dematerialised form.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to hold its investments in securities only in dematerialised form

controls.control_objective: To ensure classify its entire investment portfolio (including slr securities and non-slr securities) under two categories, viz
controls.control_description:
An RCB shall classify its entire investment portfolio (including SLR securities
and non-SLR securities) under two categories, viz., 'Current' and 'Permanent'.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to classify its entire investment portfolio (including slr securities and non-slr securities) under two categories, viz

controls.control_objective: To ensure decide the category of the investment at the time of acquisition and the decision shall be recorded on the investment proposal
controls.control_description:
An RCB shall decide the category of the investment at the time of acquisition
and the decision shall be recorded on the investment proposal.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to decide the category of the investment at the time of acquisition and the decision shall be recorded on the investment proposal

controls.control_objective: To ensure be classified as 'permanent investments'
controls.control_description:
Securities acquired with the intention to hold them up to maturity shall be
classified as 'Permanent Investments'.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be classified as 'permanent investments'

controls.control_objective: To ensure exceed 50 per cent of an rcb's total investments
controls.control_description:
Investments under Permanent Category shall not exceed 50 per cent of an
RCB's total investments.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to exceed 50 per cent of an rcb's total investments

controls.control_objective: To ensure be applicable on investments in the government securities
controls.control_description:
Explanation: The 50 per cent limit stated above shall not be applicable on
investments in the Government Securities.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be applicable on investments in the government securities

controls.control_objective: To ensure be eligible for inclusion under permanent category: (1) slr securities
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be eligible for inclusion under permanent category: (1) slr securities

controls.control_objective: To ensure be first taken to the profit & loss account and thereafter shall be appropriated to the 'capital reserve account'
controls.control_description:
Profit on sale of investments from Permanent Category shall be first taken to
the Profit & Loss Account and thereafter shall be appropriated to the 'Capital
Reserve Account'.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be first taken to the profit & loss account and thereafter shall be appropriated to the 'capital reserve account'

controls.control_objective: To ensure be net of taxes and amount required to be transferred to statutory reserves
controls.control_description:
The amount so appropriated shall be net of taxes and
amount required to be transferred to statutory reserves.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be net of taxes and amount required to be transferred to statutory reserves

controls.control_objective: To ensure be recognised in the profit & loss account
controls.control_description:
Loss on sale shall be
recognised in the Profit & Loss Account.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be recognised in the profit & loss account

controls.control_objective: To ensure be classified as 'current investments'
controls.control_description:
Securities acquired and held with the intention of reselling them in the short
term shall be classified as 'Current Investments'.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be classified as 'current investments'

controls.control_objective: To ensure be classified under 'current' category
controls.control_description:
Provided that all investments in non-SLR securities from July 14, 2016, shall be
classified under 'Current' category.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be classified under 'current' category

controls.control_objective: To ensure be taken to the income statement
controls.control_description: Profit or loss on sale of investments shall be taken to the income statement.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be taken to the income statement

controls.control_objective: To ensure have the option to shift investments to / from permanent category with the approval of the board once a year
controls.control_description:
An RCB shall have the option to shift investments to / from Permanent
Category with the approval of the Board once a year.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to have the option to shift investments to / from permanent category with the approval of the board once a year

controls.control_objective: To ensure be done at the beginning of the accounting year
controls.control_description:
Provided that such shifting shall be done at the beginning of the accounting
year.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be done at the beginning of the accounting year

controls.control_objective: To ensure be done during the remaining part of that accounting year
controls.control_description:
Provided further that additional shifting to / from the Permanent Category
shall not be done during the remaining part of that accounting year.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be done during the remaining part of that accounting year

controls.control_objective: To ensure be recognized prior to the transfer of security from current category to permanent category
controls.control_description:
In cases where market value of a security as on the date of transfer is less than
the carrying value in the books, potential losses shall be recognized prior to the
transfer of security from Current Category to Permanent Category.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be recognized prior to the transfer of security from current category to permanent category

controls.control_objective: To ensure be valued at cost
controls.control_description:
Investments under Permanent Category need not be 'marked to market' and
shall be valued at cost.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be valued at cost

controls.control_objective: To ensure be amortized over the remaining period of maturity of the security
controls.control_description:
(1) Where the cost price is higher than the face value, the premium shall be
amortized over the remaining period of maturity of the security.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be amortized over the remaining period of maturity of the security

controls.control_objective: To ensure be amortized or taken to income account since the amount represents unrealised gain
controls.control_description:
(2) Where the cost price is less than the face value, the difference shall be
ignored and shall not be amortized or taken to income account since the
amount represents unrealised gain.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be amortized or taken to income account since the amount represents unrealised gain

controls.control_objective: To ensure be valued scrip-wise and depreciation shall be provided for
controls.control_description:
Securities under Current Category shall be valued scrip-wise and depreciation
shall be provided for.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be valued scrip-wise and depreciation shall be provided for

controls.control_objective: To ensure be ignored
controls.control_description: Net appreciation, if any, shall be ignored.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be ignored

controls.control_objective: To ensure be reduced on account of net appreciation in any other classification
controls.control_description:
Net depreciation
required to be provided for in any one classification shall not be reduced on
account of net appreciation in any other classification.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be reduced on account of net appreciation in any other classification

controls.control_objective: To ensure be reduced from appreciation in similar classification in another category
controls.control_description:
Similarly net depreciation
for any classification in one category shall not be reduced from appreciation in
similar classification in another category.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be reduced from appreciation in similar classification in another category

controls.control_objective: To ensure be as under:
controls.control_description:
Chapter VI: Market Value
The 'market value' for the purpose of periodical valuation of investments
included in the Current Category shall be as under:
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be as under:

controls.control_objective: To ensure be the prices declared by the financial benchmarks india pvt
controls.control_description:
The 'market value' for the quoted securities shall be the prices declared by the
Financial Benchmarks India Pvt.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be the prices declared by the financial benchmarks india pvt

controls.control_objective: To ensure be as available from the trades / quotes on the exchanges / reporting platforms / trading platforms authorized by rbi / sebi and prices declared by fi
controls.control_description:
For securities whose prices are not published by FBIL, market price of
the quoted security shall be as available from the trades / quotes on the
exchanges / reporting platforms / trading platforms authorized by RBI / SEBI
and prices declared by Fixed Income Money Market and Derivatives
Association of India (FIMMDA).
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be as available from the trades / quotes on the exchanges / reporting platforms / trading platforms authorized by rbi / sebi and prices declared by fi

controls.control_objective: To ensure be valued on the basis of the prices / ytm rates put out by the fbil
controls.control_description:
Central Government Securities
(1) Unquoted Central Government Securities shall be valued on the basis of
the prices / YTM rates put out by the FBIL.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be valued on the basis of the prices / ytm rates put out by the fbil

controls.control_objective: To ensure be valued at carrying cost
controls.control_description: (2) Treasury Bills shall be valued at carrying cost.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be valued at carrying cost

controls.control_objective: To ensure be valued on the basis of the prices / ytm rates put out by fbil
controls.control_description:
State Government Securities
State Government Securities shall be valued on the basis of the prices / YTM
rates put out by FBIL.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be valued on the basis of the prices / ytm rates put out by fbil

controls.control_objective: To ensure be valued applying the ytm method by marking it up by 25 basis points above the yields of the central government securities of equivalent maturity put
controls.control_description:
Other Approved Securities
Other approved securities shall be valued applying the YTM method by marking
it up by 25 basis points above the yields of the Central Government Securities
of equivalent maturity put out by FBIL.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be valued applying the ytm method by marking it up by 25 basis points above the yields of the central government securities of equivalent maturity put

controls.control_objective: To ensure be valued on the ytm basis
controls.control_description:
Debentures / Bonds of AIFIs and PSUs
All debentures / bonds other than debentures / bonds which are in the nature of
advance should be valued on the YTM basis.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be valued on the ytm basis

controls.control_objective: To ensure be <image> of different ratings
controls.control_description:
Such debentures / bonds may be
<image>
of different ratings.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be <image> of different ratings

controls.control_objective: To ensure be valued with appropriate mark-up over the ytm rates for central government securities as put out by fimmda periodically
controls.control_description:
These shall be valued with appropriate mark-up over the
YTM rates for Central Government Securities as put out by FIMMDA
periodically.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be valued with appropriate mark-up over the ytm rates for central government securities as put out by fimmda periodically

controls.control_objective: To ensure be graded according to the ratings assigned to the debentures / bonds by the rating agencies subject to the following: (1) the rate used for the ytm f
controls.control_description:
The mark-up shall be graded according to the ratings assigned to
the debentures / bonds by the rating agencies subject to the following:
(1) The rate used for the YTM for rated debentures / bonds should be, at
least, 50 basis points above the rate applicable to a Government of India
bond of equivalent maturity.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be graded according to the ratings assigned to the debentures / bonds by the rating agencies subject to the following: (1) the rate used for the ytm f

controls.control_objective: To ensure be less than the rate applicable to rated debentures / bonds of equivalent maturity
controls.control_description:
(2) The rate used for the YTM for un-rated debentures / bonds shall not be
less than the rate applicable to rated debentures / bonds of equivalent
maturity.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be less than the rate applicable to rated debentures / bonds of equivalent maturity

controls.control_objective: To ensure appropriately reflect the credit risk borne by the bank
controls.control_description:
The mark-up for the un-rated debentures / bonds shall
appropriately reflect the credit risk borne by the bank.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to appropriately reflect the credit risk borne by the bank

controls.control_objective: To ensure be made for the debentures as in the case of debentures / bonds treated as advances
controls.control_description:
(3) Where interest / principal on the debenture / bonds is in arrears, the
provision shall be made for the debentures as in the case of debentures /
bonds treated as advances.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be made for the debentures as in the case of debentures / bonds treated as advances

controls.control_objective: To ensure be allowed to be set off against appreciation against other debentures / bonds
controls.control_description:
The depreciation / provision requirement
towards debentures where the interest is in arrears or principal is not paid
as per due date, shall not be allowed to be set off against appreciation
against other debentures / bonds.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be allowed to be set off against appreciation against other debentures / bonds

controls.control_objective: To ensure be higher than the rate at which the transaction is recorded on the stock exchange
controls.control_description:
(4) Where the debentures / bond is quoted and there have been transactions
within 15 days prior to the valuation date, the value adopted shall not be
higher than the rate at which the transaction is recorded on the stock
exchange.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be higher than the rate at which the transaction is recorded on the stock exchange

controls.control_objective: To ensure be valued at face value
controls.control_description:
Share of Co-operative Institutions
If a RCB has regularly received dividends from co-operative institutions, then
their shares shall be valued at face value.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be valued at face value

controls.control_objective: To ensure make full provision in respect of its investments in shares of such co-operative institutions
controls.control_description:
In such cases,
the RCB shall make full provision in respect of its investments in shares of such
co-operative institutions.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to make full provision in respect of its investments in shares of such co-operative institutions

controls.control_objective: To ensure be valued at ₹1 per co-operative institution
controls.control_description:
In cases where the financial position of co-operative
institutions in whose shares RCB has made investments is not available, the
shares shall be valued at ₹1 per co-operative institution.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be valued at ₹1 per co-operative institution

controls.control_objective: To ensure be valued as per stock exchange quotations
controls.control_description:
Units of Mutual Fund
<image>
Investments in quoted Mutual Fund Units shall be valued as per stock
exchange quotations.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be valued as per stock exchange quotations

controls.control_objective: To ensure be valued on the basis of the latest re-purchase price declared by the mutual funds in respect of each particular scheme
controls.control_description:
Investments in non-quoted Mutual Funds Units shall be
valued on the basis of the latest re-purchase price declared by the Mutual
Funds in respect of each particular Scheme.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be valued on the basis of the latest re-purchase price declared by the mutual funds in respect of each particular scheme

controls.control_objective: To ensure be valued at nav
controls.control_description:
In case of funds with a lock-in
period, or where repurchase price / market quote is not available, units shall be
valued at NAV.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be valued at nav

controls.control_objective: To ensure be valued at cost, till the end of the lock-in period
controls.control_description:
If NAV is not available, then these shall be valued at cost, till
the end of the lock-in period.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be valued at cost, till the end of the lock-in period

controls.control_objective: To ensure be valued at the carrying cost
controls.control_description:
Commercial Papers and Certificate of Deposits
Commercial papers and Certificate of Deposits shall be valued at the carrying
cost.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be valued at the carrying cost

controls.control_objective: To ensure be valued in the books at carrying cost which shall be computed by adding the acquisition cost and discount accrued at the rate prevailing at the time
controls.control_description:
Zero coupon bonds (ZCBs)
(1) ZCBs shall be valued in the books at carrying cost which shall be
computed by adding the acquisition cost and discount accrued at the rate
prevailing at the time of acquisition, which shall be marked to market with
reference to the market value.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be valued in the books at carrying cost which shall be computed by adding the acquisition cost and discount accrued at the rate prevailing at the time

controls.control_objective: To ensure be marked to market with reference to the present value of the zcbs
controls.control_description:
(2) In the absence of market value, the ZCBs shall be marked to market with
reference to the present value of the ZCBs.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be marked to market with reference to the present value of the zcbs

controls.control_objective: To ensure be calculated by discounting the face value using the 'zero coupon yield curve', with appropriate mark up as per the zero-coupon spreads put out by fi
controls.control_description:
Explanation: The present value of the ZCB may be calculated by
discounting the face value using the 'Zero Coupon Yield Curve', with

controls.control_objective: To ensure ensure that aggregate transactions (both purchases and sales) executed through an individual broker do not exceed 5 per cent of total transactions through brokers in a financial year under review
controls.control_description:
An RCB shall ensure that aggregate transactions (both purchases and sales)
executed through an individual broker do not exceed 5 per cent of total
transactions through brokers in a financial year under review, subject to the
following conditions:
(1) The limit shall be observed with reference to the year under review and
the RCB shall keep in view the expected turnover of the current year
which shall be based on turnover of the previous year and anticipated rise
or fall in the volume of business in the current year.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to ensure that aggregate transactions (both purchases and sales) executed through an individual broker do not exceed 5 per cent of total transactions through brokers in a financial year under review
